c_signature: static void mpfr_atan_aux (mpfr_ptr y, mpz_ptr p, unsigned long r, int m, mpz_t *tab)
doc:
PARKED. Static helper for mpfr_atan (mpfr/src/atan.c L91). Computes the inner sum of an atan series expansion using GMP mpz arithmetic. ADR 0002 criterion (i): no public-API caller in the TS port (mpfr_atan is not selected for porting; src/ops/ has no atan*.ts). Standalone porting would produce dead code in src/. Additionally: signature uses mpz_ptr / mpz_t* — natural TS surface would use bigint, but no parent op needs this transformation today.

Unblock condition: when mpfr_atan is selected for porting, mpfr_atan_aux is inlined into it (no public TS surface).
refs: mpfr/src/atan.c L478 -- the call site inside the unported mpfr_atan.
